specCodeDefects.defect: import { type Ref } from '@tanstack/react-table' — Ref is a React type, not a TanStack type
Fragment used in JSX (<Fragment key={row.id}>) but not imported anywhere in spec sketch
ReactElement used in forwardRef cast return type but not imported
useImperativeHandle only lists 5 methods (addRow/deleteRow/updateRow/scrollTo/getSelection) but GridHandle<TData> has 7 required non-optional methods (+ clearSelection + refresh)
specCodeDefects.fix: Added no-op clearSelection: () => { table.setRowSelection({}); } and refresh: () => { table.resetRowSelection(); }

specCodeDefects.defect: addRow: () => { props.onAddRow?.(); } drops the seed parameter — GridHandle.addRow signature is (seed?: Partial<TData>) => void
